brandIdentity.targetAudience: Founders and C-suite executives scaling businesses from $1M to $50M+ revenue, seeking proven methodologies, leadership frameworks, and peer community

primary.name: Page Background
primary.usedFor: Main page background for all sections, hero areas, and full-bleed dark panels — the deepest layer of every page

primary.name: Card Background
primary.usedFor: Card surfaces, nav bar background, footer container, modal backgrounds, all elevated surfaces sitting above the page background

primary.name: Primary CTA
primary.usedFor: All primary action buttons (Download Now, Contact Us, Back to Homepage, Master Business Growth Today), active nav states, category filter pills, label chips, focus rings

primary.name: Accent / Highlight
primary.usedFor: Gradient endpoint for accent words within H1/H2 headings (linear-gradient from #6453e5 to #897aeb), hover tint on Primary CTA, decorative purple section labels like 'Our Purpose'

primary.name: Heading Text
primary.usedFor: All H1, H2, H3 text, large stat numbers, card titles, bold navigation labels, any text requiring maximum contrast

primary.name: Body Text
primary.usedFor: Paragraph copy, card descriptions, nav link text, footer link text, list items — slightly dimmed white to reduce eye strain on dark backgrounds

primary.name: Secondary Text
primary.usedFor: Subtitles, instructor job titles, date stamps, caption text, meta information, stat labels beneath large numbers, helper text

primary.name: Border / Divider
primary.usedFor: Card borders, footer container outline, section separators, input field borders — subtle purple-tinted line that echoes the Primary CTA

utility.name: Success
utility.usedFor: Success states, form confirmations, check mark icons

utility.name: Error / Alert Accent
utility.usedFor: Form validation errors, destructive action states; also the dominant color of the Scaling Up book cover imagery and some decorative icon fills repeated throughout the site — do not use as a UI CTA color

utility.name: Glow / Aura
utility.usedFor: Ambient radial-gradient background glow placed behind hero sections and bottom CTA blocks — Primary CTA (#6453e5) at 15% opacity

primary.hoverEffect: background: #7465e8; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(100,83,229,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease

secondary.hoverEffect: border-color: #6453e5; background: rgba(100,83,229,0.08); transition: all 0.2s ease

spacing.desktopColumns: 2-col for resource and course grids, 3-col for instructor/team and values grids, 3-col for pathway cards
spacing.mobileBreakpoint: 768px — all multi-column grids collapse to 1 column

effects.name: Hero Purple Ambient Glow
effects.description: background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 0%, rgba(100,83,229,0.25) 0%, transparent 60%) layered over the Page Background; used in hero sections and large CTA blocks to create depth without images

effects.name: Heading Gradient Accent Word
effects.description: Selected emphasis words in H1/H2 apply: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6453e5 0%, #897aeb 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text — examples: 'Top' in Top Thought Leaders, 'Approach' in Our Approach, 'Team' in Our Team

effects.name: Card Hover Lift
effects.description: transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; hover state: transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(100,83,229,0.2); applied to course cards, resource download cards, and pathway cards

effects.name: Circular Purple Blob Glow
effects.description: Absolute-positioned element with border-radius: 50%, width: 600px, height: 600px, background: rgba(100,83,229,0.15), filter: blur(80px), pointer-events: none; placed behind hero content and bottom CTA sections to create atmospheric depth

effects.name: Section Background Alternation
effects.description: Sections alternate between pure #0d0f1e and rgba(36,35,40,0.6) — a subtle elevated panel — to create visual rhythm and section separation without hard borders or sharp color jumps

effects.name: 404 Large Type Glow
effects.description: Oversized decorative text (404, large stat numbers) uses: color: transparent; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6453e5 0%, #522583 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; opacity: 0.4; positioned as an absolute background layer

logoUsage.versionAndSize: White logo mark (angular slash/chevron icon) + 'GROWTH INSTITUTE' uppercase wordmark side-by-side, total lockup height: 36px, top-left aligned in nav bar
Same white logo mark + wordmark lockup, height: 32px, bottom-left aligned within the footer card container
Standalone slash/chevron icon mark only, 32x32px, white on transparent or dark background
At least 16px on all sides of the full logo lockup; logo always appears on dark (#0d0f1e or #242328) or purple surfaces — never on light or white backgrounds

imagePlacementMap.notes: Full-width dark background; course book mockup or platform dashboard visual placed to the left of or beneath the headline; purple ambient glow overlay layered on top; no heavy dark overlay needed if source image is already dark
Circular mask, 80–100px diameter for team overview grids; larger 200–280px rectangular crop for individual course author hero panels; grayscale-to-color treatment optional on hover
16:9 aspect ratio, full-width within card container, border-radius applied to top corners only matching the 16px card radius, no dark overlay; thumbnail sits above the card text block
Square or 4:3 crop in the upper half of the resource card; slight dark overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) acceptable to ensure card title legibility if image is light
Circular avatar, 56–64px diameter, left-aligned beside the quote text block; five-star rating row rendered above the quote in #f04124 or yellow; name and title below in Secondary Text color

Used in mini-course CTA and membership join sections; drop-shadow applied (box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)), no border-radius; placed left of text block on desktop (50/50 split), stacked above text on mobile
Large social platform icon centered in a Card Background (#242328) tile with Primary CTA border; LinkedIn card spans full width on left, Instagram and YouTube stack on right in a 2:1 column layout

imagePlacementMap.pageSection: Pathway / Product Cards (Master Courses, Learning Hub, Consulting)
imagePlacementMap.notes: Thumbnail image fills top third of pathway card; card has dark overlay gradient (linear-gradient from transparent to #242328) over image bottom edge to blend into card body text; 3-column grid desktop
